expected_behavior: Normalizes to rates per population before coloring (raw counts = population map)
States classification scheme with rationale; colorblind-safe ramp; NoData in neutral gray
Includes required furniture: units in legend, source, projection

evals.prompt: Make maps of the same indicator for 2010, 2015, 2020, 2025 side by side.
expected_behavior: Uses manual/defined identical breaks, ramp, and extent across all panels
Rejects per-date Jenks breaks as incomparable

evals.prompt: Interactive web map of 800k GPS points.
expected_behavior: Refuses raw GeoJSON into Leaflet; tiles (PMTiles) or GPU rendering (deck.gl/Kepler)
Ships a legend and formatted popups

evals.prompt: Review this global Web Mercator map that compares forest area by the apparent size of each country.
expected_behavior: Flags Web Mercator area distortion as invalid for visual area comparison
Requires an equal-area projection or a non-area encoding and documents the projection
Checks legend units, source, and accessible color contrast before publication

evals.prompt: Make this spatial dataset into a professional map for stakeholders, but I have not chosen the medium or audience yet.
expected_behavior: Asks for audience, medium, geographic extent, and decision purpose before fixing the design
Offers a provisional layout while keeping classification, projection, and accessibility choices explicit

evals.prompt: Train and validate a classifier that labels crop types from a multispectral satellite image; no map design is needed.
expected_behavior: Routes to remote-sensing-analysis for imagery classification and spatial validation
Does not activate cartography-geoviz merely because the input is spatial

evals.prompt: Optimize the PostGIS query behind an existing map; the cartographic design and frontend are already complete.
expected_behavior: Routes to postgis-spatial-sql for query-plan and index analysis
Does not redesign the map when the request is exclusively database performance
